prose:
**Ethylene frontier‐orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals; no density fitting) in PySCF (Sun et al. 2020), gas phase (implicit solvent: none), charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: taken as-is from user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz` (single-point, no prior relaxation). SCF converged in 6 cycles (no warnings reported).
HOMO = −7.6155818 eV, LUMO = −0.17986527 eV → gap = 7.4357165 eV.
Command:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier \
/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz \
--method dft --tier standard --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpjdicyvjx/live.json
```
JSON output written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpjdicyvjx/live.json`.  integrity.trustworthy = true; provenance = computed.
